extracted.title: Pipeline Operational Status for February 15th, 2026 08:30 CCT
extracted.description:
Notice Text:

Status - Critical

System Linepack - 3,466 MMCF

Target Linepack - 3,200 MMCF

Forecasted Linepack - 3,540 MMCF

Physical Operations Notes: Linepack increased overnight to an unhealthy level and is expected to increase further today.

Commercial Operations Notes: Shippers must trend their accounts into tolerance.

Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status can be found in LINK under Flowing Gas, Imbalance, Pipeline Operational & Commercial Status.
